Entry Requirements

What you need before you can forge anything.

Training Application

Trainees must submit a training application via the College's Training Management Platform (TMP) prior to commencing training, at the start of the Foundation phase.

Application deadlines

28 February  /  31 August

The application confirms you meet eligibility criteria and identifies the Director of Physician Education who will oversee your training.

Entry Criteria

  • A Basic Training position in an RACP-accredited training setting or network
  • General medical registration with the Medical Board of Australia AU
  • Medical registration with a general scope of practice with the MCNZ NZ

Selection Criteria

  • A commitment and capability to pursuing a career as a physician or paediatrician
  • The ability to plan and manage their learning
  • Communication
  • Cultural competence
  • Ethics and professional behaviour
  • Leadership, management, and teamwork
White Coat Forge — RACP Basic Training Reference  ·  Not affiliated with RACP
